comment: MOBILE entry config: the same no-auth base + data-kitchen overrides as dk-pivot.json, PLUS mobile-databrowser.json which re-enables the SolidOS/mashlib databrowser as the frontend. Imported last so its DefaultUiConverter/StaticAssetHandler @ids win. Compiled to pivot/dist/create-app-mobile.cjs via `bash pivot/build-compiled-config.sh mobile`; used only by the mobile app (mobile/tool/prepare-node-project.sh). Desktop keeps dk-pivot.json (no databrowser).
